requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (IEC 60335-2-24 Annex via ZWS; Montreal/Kigali ODS controls)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（经ZWS采用的IEC 60335-2-24附件；蒙特利尔/基加利消耗臭氧物质管控）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（經ZWS採用的IEC 60335-2-24附件；蒙特利爾/基加利消耗臭氧物質管控）

summary.en: Zimbabwe does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down regulation. Refrigerant control in Zimbabwe is exercised mainly through (1) the appliance safety standard — household refrigerators using flammable refrigerant must meet the R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3, ISO 817 class A3) charge-limit, ventilation and ignition-source requirements of the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex (adopted as ZWS via SAZ and mirrored by SANS), with refrigerant type and charge mass declared in the product documentation; and (2) Zimbabwe's obligations under the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, administered nationally (typically via the environment authority / National Ozone Unit) governing import controls and phase-down of HCFC/HFC ozone-depleting and high-GWP substances. R-600a is a hydrocarbon, not an ozone-depleting substance, so it is well-positioned; manufacturers should still confirm that any HFC-based models (for example R134a) are compatible with Zimbabwe's import-licensing and phase-down schedule.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦不设欧盟式氟气体削减法规。津巴布韦的制冷剂管控主要通过：（1）器具安全标准——使用可燃制冷剂的家用冰箱须满足IEC 60335-2-24附件（经SAZ采用为ZWS并与SANS对应）对R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3，ISO 817 A3类）的充注量限值、通风及点火源要求，并在产品文件中声明制冷剂类型及充注质量；及（2）津巴布韦在《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》下的义务，由国内（通常为环境主管机构/国家臭氧机构）管理，规范HCFC/HFC等消耗臭氧及高GWP物质的进口管控与削减。R-600a为碳氢化合物，非消耗臭氧物质，故条件良好；制造商仍应确认任何含HFC型号（例如R134a）是否符合津巴布韦的进口许可及削减时间表。
summary.zht: 辛巴威不設歐盟式氟氣體削減法規。辛巴威的製冷劑管控主要通過：（1）器具安全標準——使用可燃製冷劑的家用冰箱須滿足IEC 60335-2-24附件（經SAZ採用為ZWS並與SANS對應）對R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3，ISO 817 A3類）的充注量限值、通風及點火源要求，並在產品文件中聲明製冷劑類型及充注質量；及（2）辛巴威在《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》下的義務，由國內（通常為環境主管機構/國家臭氧機構）管理，規範HCFC/HFC等消耗臭氧及高GWP物質的進口管控與削減。R-600a為碳氫化合物，非消耗臭氧物質，故條件良好；製造商仍應確認任何含HFC型號（例如R134a）是否符合辛巴威的進口許可及削減時間表。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements) — adopted as ZWS via SAZ; mirrored by SANS 60335-2-24
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)

Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer and the Kigali Amendment — Zimbabwe is a party; import controls / phase-down of HCFC and HFC administered nationally via the environment authority / National Ozone Unit

summary.en: At the appliance level, China addresses flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits and safety through GB 4706.13-2014 (which incorporates R-600a provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24), supported by GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China has not adopted an EU-style F-Gas phase-down for refrigeration; it operates its HCFC/HFC phase-down under the Montreal Protocol and the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese exporters shipping R-600a refrigerators are generally well-positioned for both the safety and ozone/phase-down aspects, but must verify charge amounts and documentation against the importing market's requirements.
summary.zh: 在器具层面，中国通过GB 4706.13-2014（纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a规定）处理可燃制冷剂（R-600a）充注量限值及安全，并以GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）为支撑。中国未采用欧盟式制冷氟气体削减；其HCFC/HFC削减依据《蒙特利尔议定书》及《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。运送R-600a冰箱的中国出口商在安全及臭氧/削减方面一般条件良好，但须依据进口市场要求核实充注量及文件。
summary.zht: 在器具層面，中國通過GB 4706.13-2014（納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a規定）處理可燃製冷劑（R-600a）充注量限值及安全，並以GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）為支撐。中國未採用歐盟式製冷氟氣體削減；其HCFC/HFC削減依據《蒙特利爾議定書》及《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。運送R-600a冰箱的中國出口商在安全及臭氧/削減方面一般條件良好，但須依據進口市場要求核實充注量及文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — provisions for flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — China HCFC/HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is mainly documentation and import-control verification rather than a fundamental technology gap: (1) Charge and documentation — product documentation for Zimbabwe should state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge mass in grams, and the relevant safety precautions, and the charge should be verified against the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex limits adopted as ZWS; a Chinese CCC report may not explicitly confirm the same configuration. (2) Ozone/phase-down import controls — rather than an EU F-Gas regime, Zimbabwe applies Montreal Protocol / Kigali import licensing; R-600a (a hydrocarbon) is not an ozone-depleting substance and is unaffected, but any HFC-charged models (R134a, etc.) may require an import licence and should be checked against Zimbabwe's HCFC/HFC phase-down schedule. (3) No EU-style F-Gas prohibition list applies; exporters should confirm current import-licensing requirements with Zimbabwe's environment authority / National Ozone Unit and the in-country importer.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距主要在于文件及进口管控核实，而非根本性技术差距：（1）充注量及文件——面向津巴布韦的产品文件应说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注质量（克）及相关安全注意事项，并应依据采用为ZWS的IEC 60335-2-24附件限值核实充注量；中国CCC报告可能未明确确认相同配置。（2）臭氧/削减进口管控——津巴布韦适用的不是欧盟氟气体制度，而是《蒙特利尔议定书》/基加利进口许可；R-600a（碳氢化合物）非消耗臭氧物质，不受影响，但任何含HFC型号（R134a等）可能须办理进口许可，并应依据津巴布韦HCFC/HFC削减时间表核实。（3）不适用欧盟式氟气体禁令清单；出口商应向津巴布韦环境主管机构/国家臭氧机构及境内进口商确认现行进口许可要求。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距主要在於文件及進口管控核實，而非根本性技術差距：（1）充注量及文件——面向辛巴威的產品文件應說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注質量（克）及相關安全注意事項，並應依據採用為ZWS的IEC 60335-2-24附件限值核實充注量；中國CCC報告可能未明確確認相同配置。（2）臭氧/削減進口管控——辛巴威適用的不是歐盟氟氣體制度，而是《蒙特利爾議定書》/基加利進口許可；R-600a（碳氫化合物）非消耗臭氧物質，不受影響，但任何含HFC型號（R134a等）可能須辦理進口許可，並應依據辛巴威HCFC/HFC削減時間表核實。（3）不適用歐盟式氟氣體禁令清單；出口商應向辛巴威環境主管機構/國家臭氧機構及境內進口商確認現行進口許可要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge and safety requirements apply via IEC 60335-2-24 Annex (ZWS through the safety standard); ozone/phase-down import controls apply to HCFC/HFC substances under Montreal Protocol / Kigali (administered nationally). R-600a hydrocarbon refrigerant is not subject to ozone phase-down. No EU-style F-Gas prohibition list.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HCFC/HFC phase-down under Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: UNEP Ozone Secretariat — Zimbabwe country profile (Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-suited for the Zimbabwe market: as a hydrocarbon it is not an ozone-depleting substance and is not subject to phase-down, while its safety is governed by the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex adopted via ZWS. Verify R-600a charge mass against the Annex limits and declare refrigerant type/charge in product documentation. Any HFC-based models should be checked against Zimbabwe's Montreal/Kigali import-licensing schedule. Zimbabwe has no EU-style F-Gas regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a适合津巴布韦市场：作为碳氢化合物，它非消耗臭氧物质，不受削减约束，其安全由经ZWS采用的IEC 60335-2-24附件管理。须依据附件限值核实R-600a充注质量，并在产品文件中声明制冷剂类型/充注量。任何含HFC型号应依据津巴布韦蒙特利尔/基加利进口许可时间表核实。津巴布韦无欧盟式氟气体法规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a適合辛巴威市場：作為碳氫化合物，它非消耗臭氧物質，不受削減約束，其安全由經ZWS採用的IEC 60335-2-24附件管理。須依據附件限值核實R-600a充注質量，並在產品文件中聲明製冷劑類型/充注量。任何含HFC型號應依據辛巴威蒙特利爾/基加利進口許可時間表核實。辛巴威無歐盟式氟氣體法規。
